{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame team
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blackflame team]] has not yet arrived at the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blackflame team]] has not been given detection constructs.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|All his questions about the Blackflame team were answered with “They have not yet arrived.”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
